title: Glide Vanilla Music Pack
description: Music for Glide's Yeti, Kraken, and Mobs maps!
body:
Glide Vanilla Music Pack

Music for Glide's Yeti, Kraken, and Mobs maps. Comes with 3 tracks: - Gareth Coker - Flight of Fancy (Map 3) - Gareth Coker - In the Flow (Map 4) - Gareth Coker - Wonderful Wings (Map 5) Usable with [Minimega](https://modrinth.com/mod/minimega)
